# AviEdTech

> Recorded courses and hands-on labs in cybersecurity, machine learning, and web development, taught by industry experts. Lifetime access, real cloud environments, career-focused outcomes.

AviEdTech sells recorded tech courses and live hands-on labs. Learners get lifetime access, quarterly content updates, and certificates of completion.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of AviEdTech's courses, labs, categories, and featured programs.
- [All courses & labs](/products): Full catalog with filters for type, category, price, and rating.
- [Track order](/track): Look up an existing order by order number and email.

## Optional

- [Sign in](/auth): Sign in or create an AviEdTech account.
